Custom Advertising Flags for Storefronts, Events & Outdoor Promotions

Advertising flags are one of the most effective ways to promote your business, draw foot traffic, and increase brand visibility. Whether you're highlighting a grand opening, announcing a seasonal sale, or marking your location at a trade show, custom advertising flags deliver a bold, eye-catching presence that gets noticed.

Our advertising flags are made from a durable polyester-nylon blend and printed using direct dye-sublimation technology. This process dyes the ink directly into the fabric rather than printing on the surface, resulting in vibrant, full-color graphics that stay sharp even in outdoor conditions. You can add custom logos, images, text, and branding to create an advertising flag that is uniquely yours.

Advertising flags are designed for versatility. Display them outside your storefront to attract walk-in customers, set them up at trade shows and conventions, or use them at outdoor events and festivals. Their lightweight fabric moves naturally in the wind, drawing attention from every direction.

All of our fabric flags are printed in-house at our production facility and are available with flexible production times — choose from 2-day express, 3-day standard, or 5-day saver turnaround. Choose Banners.com for all your custom flag, custom banner, and signage needs.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Dye-Sublimated Fabric Material for Advertising Flags

All advertising flags are printed using a direct dye-sublimation printing process. The ink dyes the fabric rather than sitting on top of the material. This allows the flag to move and behave naturally in the wind without being weighed down or stiffened by surface-applied ink. This is an important factor when selecting properly manufactured advertising flags for outdoor use.

The dye-sublimation printing process produces an eye-catching, full-color display. You can include custom logos, images, graphics, and text on your advertising flag for maximum brand impact.

Our fabric flags are a polyester-nylon blend. They are NOT the same material as a standard U.S. flag.

Our fabric material is temperature sensitive. Due to the printing process, it can expand or contract in response to heat or cold. Because of this, we cannot guarantee the exact size of any fabric product due to temperature fluctuations. We are not responsible for any product received that does not precisely match a required dimension. If your advertising flag needs to fit within an existing frame or hardware, please communicate this to your customer service representative so they can discuss your specific application.

How Long Do Advertising Flags Last?

With proper care and installation, our custom advertising flags have an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 6 months. We recommend taking your flag down and storing it indoors during inclement weather to help extend its life.

Advertising Flag Warranty Information

We offer a prorated monthly warranty on our standard advertising flags.

For example, a prorated warranty on a standard 3x5 flag that fails 2 months after proper installation will be replaced, and we will cover 33% of the replacement cost for a new 3x5 flag.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Single-Sided & Double-Sided Advertising Flags

Single / Reverse Advertising Flags

Single / reverse advertising flags are printed on a single layer of material. The ink fully permeates the fabric, creating a reverse image on the back side. When the flag is flipped, the artwork will appear mirrored.

Double-Sided Advertising Flags

Double-sided advertising flags are printed on two separate layers of fabric with a blockout liner in between. This ensures that any wording and images always appear in the correct orientation from both sides — ideal for high-traffic locations where your flag will be viewed from multiple directions.

Additional Finishing Details

If you have questions about finishing options for your advertising flag, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be happy to help.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production & Turnaround Times for Custom Advertising Flags

We provide flexible production time options so you have full control over your advertising flag order. Production times range from two to five business days, allowing you to select the turnaround speed that fits your schedule and budget.

2 Business Days — Express Production

Need your advertising flags quickly? The express option delivers fast turnaround for time-sensitive promotions and events.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time.
  • Turnaround begins when the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged by our prepress department or a proof is requested, turnaround begins from the time approval is given.

3 Business Days — Standard Production

This is the most popular turnaround option for custom advertising flags. Standard production is included at no extra charge and is fast enough for most promotional needs.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time.
  • Turnaround begins when the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged by our prepress department or a proof is requested, turnaround begins from the time approval is given.

5 Business Days — Saver Production

If your advertising flag order is not time-sensitive, the 5-day saver option lets you save on production costs.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency and same-day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time.
  • Turnaround begins when the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged by our prepress department or a proof is requested, turnaround begins from the time approval is given.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Billing Options for Advertising Flag Orders

All advertising flags must be paid for prior to entering production. We accept the following payment methods:

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover

We also accept checks, which must be received before your advertising flag is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

Your credit card will not be charged until you have approved your order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping & Delivery Options for Custom Advertising Flags

If you have any questions about shipping your advertising flag order, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified, your order will ship via UPS Ground. We offer 1 to 3 day ground delivery to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges may apply for large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping carrier terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the product cost if UPS or any other shipping carrier experiences a delay. Delays due to natural disasters or circumstances beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds.

If a product is damaged during shipping, the damaged goods must be returned before a replacement will be sent. Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping carrier confirms the loss, which generally takes 7 to 10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery date.

International Shipping for Advertising Flags

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Advertising Flag Production Facilities & Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners: Produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever provides the best experience based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Products (Including Advertising Flags): Produced in our Minnesota facility only.

Available Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for advertising flag orders:

  • Standard (3 to 5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please include additional postal information such as a P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field at checkout to help ensure delivery. Economy shipping can add an additional 5 to 10 business days depending on the destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Popular Uses for Custom Advertising Flags

Advertising flags are one of the most versatile promotional tools available. Their lightweight, wind-catching fabric design draws attention in any setting. Here are some of the most popular ways businesses and organizations use custom advertising flags:

  • Grand Openings: Attract attention and announce your new location with bold, branded advertising flags placed outside your entrance.
  • Holiday & Seasonal Promotions: Promote special holiday deals, seasonal sales events, and limited-time offers with eye-catching custom flags.
  • New Product Launches: Highlight new products or services with a dedicated advertising flag that draws customers inside.
  • Clearance & Sale Events: Use promotional flags to alert passersby to ongoing sales, markdowns, and clearance events.
  • Storefronts & Welcome Displays: Place custom flags at your entrance to welcome visitors and reinforce brand identity.
  • Open & Now Hiring Signs: Let customers and job seekers know you are open for business or currently hiring.
  • Trade Shows & Conventions: Stand out on the exhibition floor with branded advertising flags that draw attendees to your booth.
  • Tax, Financial & Professional Services: Service-based businesses use advertising flags to increase walk-in traffic during key seasons.
  • Auto Dealerships & Car Washes: Car lots, dealerships, and car washes use promotional flags to create an inviting, high-energy atmosphere.
  • Outdoor Events & Festivals: Mark vendor locations, sponsor areas, or event entrances with custom advertising flags.
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Advertising Flag Printing

Accepted File Formats

The best file format for advertising flag printing is an .eps file with fonts converted to outlines. We also accept high-resolution .pdf and .jpg files. If you are unsure about the quality of your artwork, our professional graphic designers are happy to assist you.

Artwork & Order Proofs

If you would like to review your advertising flag order before it goes into production, you can request an order proof. Your proof will include a low-resolution preview of your artwork along with a full order summary, including pricing, billing information, and shipping details. Please note that if you request a proof, your order will not enter production until you provide approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your advertising flag project requires precise color accuracy, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System. This is the best way to ensure an exact color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom Advertising Flags Online Today

Ready to promote your business with a custom advertising flag? At Banners.com, we make it simple to design, customize, and order advertising flags online. Choose from hundreds of professionally designed templates or upload your own artwork for a fully custom flag. Our in-house design team is also available to create a custom layout based on your specifications.

Every advertising flag is printed using dye-sublimation technology on our durable polyester-nylon blend fabric, producing vibrant, full-color graphics that are built to perform outdoors. With production times as fast as 2 business days and multiple shipping options including overnight delivery, your advertising flags can arrive in as few as 3 business days.

Browse our advertising flag templates above and start designing your custom promotional flag today. For custom sizes, specialty applications, or bulk orders, contact our team or call 866.419.7446 for a free quote.

Other Types of Advertising Flags

Looking for a different flag shape or style? Browse our full selection of custom advertising flag options:

Feather Flags — Tall, curved flags ideal for storefronts, auto dealerships, and event entrances.

Rectangle Flags — Full rectangular display area for maximum branding visibility.

Tear Drop Flags — Compact, rounded flags that stay taut in the wind for a clean display.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Advertising Flags

What materials are your custom advertising flags made of?

Our advertising flags are made from a high-quality polyester-nylon blend. They are printed using dye-sublimation, a process that dyes the ink directly into the fabric fibers. This produces vivid, full-color graphics that resist fading and allow the flag to move naturally in the wind.

Do your advertising flags have a matte or glossy finish?

Our advertising flags have a matte finish, which provides excellent readability in both direct sunlight and overcast conditions. If you are looking for a glossier signage option, our custom vinyl banners include a gloss finish option.

How long will my advertising flag last outdoors?

With proper care and installation, custom advertising flags have an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 6 months. We recommend bringing your flag indoors during severe weather, high winds, or storms to help extend its useful life. We also offer a prorated monthly warranty on standard advertising flags.

What is the production time for custom advertising flags?

Standard production for custom advertising flags is 3 business days at no additional charge. A 2-day express production option is also available. With express production and overnight shipping, your advertising flag can arrive in as few as 3 business days from the time your design is approved.

What are common uses for promotional advertising flags?

  • Grand openings and ribbon-cutting events
  • Holiday and seasonal sales promotions
  • New product and service launches
  • Clearance and markdown events
  • Storefront welcome and open signs
  • Now hiring and recruitment displays
  • Tax season and professional service promotions
  • Auto dealerships and car wash promotions
  • Trade shows, conventions, and vendor booths
  • Outdoor festivals, fairs, and sporting events
PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
